description: Style NoteSuper soft vintage leather and a variety of hues to choose from, wallets from fossil are the way to go for a look that chic and versatile effortlessly. Spice up your outfit with these funky yet conventional wallets and get ready to be on top of your game!Product DetailsMustard wallet that has a zipped compartment with a metallic key attached to the zip for style, flap on the left with a buttoned closure, twelve card holders and an id card holder, zipped pocket on one side and insert pocket on the other side, gathered look on the front with a metallic keyhole detail, stitch detailing and brand name embossed on the backMaterial and CareVintage leatherWipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirtDimensions:10 cm x 18.5 cm
